'''Strike Force Altagak''' was a small [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] force that operated on the jungle [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Mentanar Vosk]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Their mission on Mentanar was to harass the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] garrison and thereby distract them from other Alliance activities in the area. The strike force consisted of two squads of elite troopers.

The force was named after the [[altagak]], a [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] predator native to [[Altora]], which was renowned for its ability to quietly stalk its prey and attack quickly.
